steps.title: Write each distance
steps.content: Distance equals rate times time. Evan drives for $e$ hours at $45$ miles per hour, so his distance is $45e$. Maya drives for $m$ hours at $50$ miles per hour, so her distance is $50m$.

steps.title: Use the total distance condition
steps.content:
The total distance was under $310$ miles, so the sum of the two distances must be strictly less than $310$:
$$45e+50m<310$$The answer is B.
